calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-28-2020 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Motion For Entry Of Prove Up Hearing Judgment
Off Calendar Aug-04-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Sandbox Suites, Inc., a corporation and Roman Gelfer, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Jeffrey S. Ross. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

Lorna Walker, Esq. appeared via CourtCall for plaintiff Waldman Management Group, Inc., a corporation.
Jennifer Bremer, Chief Executive Officer for plaintiff, was placed under oath and testified.
Ms. Bremer appeared for this morning's proceedings via CourtCall.
No appearance by defendants Sandbox Suites, Inc., a corporation or Roman Gelfer, an individual.
Plaintiff's Complaint for Money/Collections was filed on April 18, 2019.
Substitute service on defendant Sandbox Suites, Inc., a corporation, occurred on May 17, 2019 and was effectuated on May 28, 2019.
Summons & Complaint were personally served on defendant Roman Gelfer, an individual, on July 31, 2019.
Default as to both defendants was entered on September 5, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed on October 31, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Waldman Management Group, Inc., a corporation, and against the defaulted defendants Sandbox Suites, Inc., a corporation and Roman Gelfer, an individual, Jointly and Severally, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $108,396.95.
Prejudgment Interest - $24,048.90.
Attorney Fees - $2,825.00.
Costs - $670.85.

Total - $135,941.70.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
